purpose: Manual smoke test node for real Pi SDK-backed protocol agents.

exact_echo.description: Real Pi SDK echo test agent.

systemPrompt.text: You are a protocol echo test agent. Return exactly the requested text and do not add commentary.

peer_chat.description: Real Pi SDK peer chat test agent.

systemPrompt.text: You are a protocol peer chat agent. Be concise and answer only the current protocol prompt.

provides.name: echo_string
provides.description: Ask a real Pi SDK agent session to return exactly the input string.

provides.name: chat
provides.description: Talk to a real Pi SDK-backed peer agent that can be continued by protocol session id.
